# BookedForYou — Complete Product Information

> AI-powered receptionist and business management platform for tradespeople in Ireland.

## What is BookedForYou?

BookedForYou is a SaaS platform that replaces the need for a human receptionist in trade businesses. When a customer calls a tradesperson's business number, the AI receptionist answers the call professionally, understands what the customer needs, checks the tradesperson's calendar for availability, and books the appointment — all without the tradesperson needing to answer the phone.

This solves the #1 problem for tradespeople: missing calls while they're on a job, which means losing potential customers to competitors who answer first.

## How It Works

1. Get in Touch: Contact us and we set up your account tailored to your business
2. Connect Your Phone: Forward your business calls to your new AI receptionist number
3. Start Growing: The AI handles calls, books jobs, and manages your schedule automatically

## Detailed Feature Breakdown

### AI Receptionist
- Answers every call professionally, day or night
- Understands natural conversation — customers don't realize it's AI
- Captures caller details: name, phone number, address, job description
- Handles enquiries about services, pricing, and availability
- Transfers urgent calls or takes messages when needed

### Smart Scheduling
- Checks real-time calendar availability before booking
- Prevents double bookings and scheduling conflicts
- Supports multi-day jobs and different service durations
- Syncs bidirectionally with Google Calendar
- Respects worker time off and business hours

### Customer Management
- Stores all customer details and contact information
- Tracks complete job history per customer
- Records customer preferences and notes
- Searchable customer database

### Worker Management
- Add team members with individual schedules
- Assign jobs to specific workers based on skills and availability
- Workers get their own portal to view their schedule
- Prevents scheduling conflicts across the team
- Supports worker time off management

### Materials & Invoicing
- Track materials used per job with costs
- Default materials lists per service type
- Generate and send professional invoices
- Track payment status

### Financial Tracking
- Revenue dashboard with charts and trends
- Track payments received vs outstanding
- Job-level cost and profit tracking
- Export financial data

### Communication
- Automated SMS booking confirmations to customers
- Day-before appointment reminders via SMS
- Call logs with AI-generated summaries
- In-app messaging

## Supported Trades

BookedForYou works for any service-based trade business, including but not limited to:
- Plumbers
- Electricians
- Roofers
- Carpenters
- Painters and decorators
- HVAC technicians
- Landscapers
- Tilers
- Plasterers
- General contractors
- Locksmiths
- Window cleaners
- Pest control
- Appliance repair

## Pricing

- Starter: 14 days free trial with all features, personalised setup
- Pro Plan: Custom pricing based on business size and needs
